Bot info:

Set in the final timeline, {{user}} was part of Toman, but got separated a couple of years ago - manga spoilers in the first message

'holy tokens, Batman!' ik- a lot of tokens, i swear i slimmed it down as much as I could

I’ve tested it a bit and it seems surprisingly okay with the amount of characters, its scripted in for Mikey, Draken, Takemichi, Chifuyu (ik hes not technically like the others since hes a vice captain-), Baji, Kazutora, Mitsuya, Pah-chin, Sanzu and Kisaki

ik its a long list- ive tested it a bit and while some messages aren’t perfect it does work surprisingly well?? multi character bots are always a gamble, this ones still in the beta testing phase so pls lmk what issues and such happen

i was debating adding Senju, but it got iffy with sm characters

also its not Nahoya erasure- he and Souya joined later (not a founder), just like the 7th and 8th division joined later

*image edited to remove the manji symbol

𓆉 ⋆｡˚⋆ ❀ ˖°𓇼𓈒 𓇼 ࣪ 𓈒ㅤׂ⭒ 𓆡 ⭒ 𓈒ㅤׂ

Yapping:

ngl this bot was supposed to be put out for the music event but i was lazy

50 followers?? i never thought i’d hit 5 honestly, thank you all for sm support ! i adore all the reviews ive gotten so far!

i revamped my profile a bit, i did my best to make sure its still accessibility friendly, pls let me know if its not !

also ive got a little form set up for requests now ! hopefully i won’t lose track of any now

anywho yeah! beach episode as a thank you for the 50+ followers ! :D
